comment.body:
"The upside pivot is 6332.37
Volatility is expected to calm down here too, and then the spot would revert from the pivot. If right wing of the skew is bid (this is what the market bets on), the max level is 6368.49, and here, above the pivot if vol calms down, 6352 would pin."

comment.body: Just a quick personal POV to maybe help new folks. Whenever Alma references a "rangebound" day and/or theta buying in her post, I stay off of options, at least short term expiries. It's helped me a lot in staying in my lane (which maybe more conservative but it helps.)
comment.raw_body: Just a quick personal POV to maybe help new folks. Whenever Alma references a "rangebound" day and/or theta buying in her post, I stay off of options, at least short term expiries. It's helped me a lot in staying in my lane (which maybe more conservative but it helps.)

comment.body: Huuum my experience though is that rangebound periods tend to be quite good for reversion scalping as the price just ping-pong in between. (Of course Alma gave us other specifications, i.e., steep speed profile).
comment.raw_body: Huuum my experience though is that rangebound periods tend to be quite good for reversion scalping as the price just ping-pong in between. (Of course Alma gave us other specifications, i.e., steep speed profile).
